response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such EPA regulation exists at 40 CFR §120 (that part is not used for Clean Water Act wetlands rules), the cited Federal Register citation (91 Fed. Reg. 18,442) is unverifiable and does not correspond to any real rulemaking, and the described "Hobby-Landowner" exemption — particularly its waiver of Army Corps pre-notice requirements — has no basis in actual EPA or Section 404 regulatory history, making this document almost certainly invented.
